title: Implement HTML page layout inheritance via data-template wrappers
description:
Extend layout support from markdown-only to HTML pages using a data-template attribute. When an HTML page includes data-template="name" on its <html> or <body> element, the build pipeline wraps the page's <main> content (or full <body>) in the referenced layout template from src/layouts/.

Attribute name: data-template (avoids collision with Vanilla Breeze's data-layout-* family).

Implementation:
- New build plugin (apply-template.js) that runs early in the file loop, before data-include processing
- Reads data-template value, resolves to src/layouts/{name}.html (reusing the existing layouts directory)
- Extracts page-specific values (title, description) from the source page's <head> or from data-* attributes
- Injects page content into the template's ${content} slot
- Replaces ${title}, ${description}, and other ${var} placeholders from page metadata
- Removes the data-template attribute from output
- Template files are cached (reuse store.cachedLayouts from markdown processor)

This eliminates ~20 lines of boilerplate per HTML page (head, CSS links, header/footer includes, script tags) while keeping pages focused on their unique content.
close_reason: Implemented data-template plugin, default.html layout, converted contact page as proof, added 21 unit tests

title: Add View Transitions API integration hooks
description: Roadmap item 11. Planned work: add an opt-in build feature that injects view-transition metadata and helps authors assign stable transition names to shared elements. Keep the output progressively enhanced, avoid runtime dependencies, and add tests/docs showing the no-support fallback is unchanged navigation.

title: Add optional islands architecture support
description: Roadmap item 13. Planned work: define a minimal island contract for declarative hydration, bundle only the island modules used on a page, and preserve static HTML as the baseline output. Specify props serialization rules, error handling, and progressive enhancement semantics, then add end-to-end tests for island discovery and per-page bundling.

title: Add internal link and build-output integrity checks
description: Planned work: add a build validation test pass that catches dangling internal links, missing generated targets, and format artifacts that disagree with source routes. Start with product/detail links, fragments, markdown copies, and API/HTML parity, then expand to a general site-integrity check.
close_reason: Added 24 build-output integrity tests covering internal links, product pages, fragment/JSON/markdown parity, feed, llms.txt, sitemap, and 404

title: Add markdown date regression coverage
description: Planned work: add tests that verify date-only front matter stays timezone-safe through markdown parsing, collection sorting, feed generation, JSON metadata, and rendered HTML <time> output. Include assertions for canonical YYYY-MM-DD values and valid datetime attributes.
close_reason: Added 21 date regression tests covering timezone safety, collection sorting, feed serialisation, JSON meta, HTML templates, and gray-matter integration

title: Implement asset fingerprinting and reference rewriting
description: Roadmap item 9. Planned work: add content-hash filenames for built assets, rewrite HTML references to the fingerprinted outputs, and emit a manifest for downstream lookups. Keep source maps and bundle integration working, and add tests that prove unchanged assets keep stable hashes while modified assets invalidate correctly.

title: Add product detail pages or remove broken product links
description: The site data and templates link to /products/trail-runner-pack/, /products/summit-shelter/, and /products/beacon-headlamp/, but the build only emits /products/. Users can currently click into 404s from the homepage, product grid, and footer. Either generate detail pages from product data or stop exposing those URLs until the pages exist.
close_reason: Fixed in codex review fixes batch

title: Fix Worker custom 404 fallback path
description: The Cloudflare Worker currently falls back to /404/index.html, but the build keeps the generated 404 page at dist/404.html. Missing routes therefore bypass the custom 404 page and fall back to the plain text response. Align Worker lookup with the build output and cover it with a routing test.
close_reason: Fixed in codex review fixes batch

title: Add progressive enhancement utility helpers
description: Roadmap item 15. Planned work: add optional build helpers for progressive-enhancement patterns such as declarative fallbacks, no-JS-safe markup, and async enhancement module injection. Keep the baseline HTML fully functional, define authoring conventions, and add tests that prove the generated markup still works without JavaScript.

title: Fix markdown date rendering and datetime output
description: Markdown front-matter dates are parsed with new Date(date-only) and later rendered via toLocaleDateString()/implicit Date string conversion. This shifts published dates backwards in western timezones and produces invalid datetime attribute values on post pages. Update the pipeline to preserve canonical date strings (or normalize safely) and add coverage for date formatting.
close_reason: Fixed in codex review fixes batch

title: Add named slot support to component templates
description: Roadmap item 4. Planned work: teach component replacement to collect named slotted children, expose named slot placeholders alongside the default slot, and define deterministic behavior when slots are missing or repeated. Update attribute transfer rules, document the authoring pattern, and add component rendering tests for mixed default and named slot content.
close_reason: Implemented named slot support in replace-components.js with extractSlots() method and updated renderTemplate(). 23 tests added.

title: Build an image optimization pipeline
description: Roadmap item 6. Planned work: add optional image processing that can generate responsive derivatives, modern formats, and rewritten src/srcset markup from source images at build time. Start with declarative HTML attributes, define output naming and cache rules, and cover the pipeline with fixture tests for unchanged originals, generated variants, and HTML rewriting.

title: Resolve async config/data.js handling for dynamic pages
description: scripts/build.js resolves function exports from config/data.js, but scripts/utils/get-src/get-src.js imports the module without invoking it before reading dynamicPages. As a result, dynamic page generation only works when config/data.js exports a plain object. Centralize data loading so async/function exports are supported everywhere.
close_reason: Fixed in codex review fixes batch

title: Extract and deduplicate component <style> blocks into stylesheet
description: Reclassified from build-time CSS scoping (selector rewriting). Instead: when component templates contain <style> blocks, extract them at build time, deduplicate across instances, and emit a single consolidated stylesheet. No selector rewriting — authors use native @scope and @layer for scoping. This keeps component CSS co-located with markup during authoring but efficiently bundled in output. Pairs with VB's existing @layer cascade and Shadow DOM/DSD for components needing true encapsulation.
close_reason: Implemented component style extraction and deduplication. Templates with <style> blocks get CSS extracted, deduplicated per component, and consolidated into a single <style> in <head>. No selector rewriting — authors use native @scope/@layer. 22 tests added.

title: Add critical CSS extraction and async stylesheet loading
description: Roadmap item 7. Planned work: analyze generated HTML to derive critical CSS, inline that subset into the document head, and convert the remaining stylesheet load to a non-blocking pattern with a noscript fallback. Define safe fallbacks for pages that cannot be analyzed and add regression tests around output ordering and visual safety.

title: Generate speculation rules for native prefetching
description: Roadmap item 12. Planned work: add configurable generation of speculationrules blocks for safe prefetch targets, with patterns that exclude admin, external, and non-cacheable routes. Keep it opt-in, document browser support constraints, and add tests that validate the emitted rules against the configured path filters.

title: Add web component output mode for templates
description: Roadmap item 14. Planned work: add an optional build target that can emit runtime custom-element modules from component templates without changing the default static output mode. Define the generated module contract, asset/output locations, registration behavior, and tests that verify both static and runtime outputs remain valid.

title: Add worker routing and content-negotiation integration tests
description: Planned work: add integration tests around the Cloudflare Worker and local routing middleware for fragment, markdown, JSON, and custom 404 responses. Cover rewritten asset paths, root markdown negotiation, and Vary/Content-Type behavior so routing regressions are caught before release.
close_reason: Added 36 worker integration tests covering all content negotiation, path rewriting, header, and 404 scenarios

title: Align root markdown route generation with content negotiation
description: The markdown generator writes the root page to dist/md/index/index.md, while both the local dev middleware and the Cloudflare Worker rewrite root markdown requests to /md/index.md. Nested markdown routes work, but the homepage will fail under Accept: text/markdown if it is markdown-backed. Share one root-path helper across generation and routing.
close_reason: Fixed in codex review fixes batch
